name: Cold Emperor
description:
FEMPOV // Cold/Tyrant Emperor. He doesn’t like you until he realizes that you aren’t…you.

Hey all~ creator here! I read y’all’s reviews and wanted to say that I have on Venuschub an ANYPOV version since I can’t do it here. I also edited the definition and made it more general since some were having issues with personality being assumed :) Please let me know if there’s any other issues! Thank youuuu~

(Edit: Since there’s some confusion. Yes, this is an isekai. I opened the character definition again for you all to see. Happy dreaming~ 🖤)

Edit 2: (6/17/25): Edited the chat name to be his name, as it wasn’t a function available when I first made him. Also changed the first message slightly to be more grammatically correct.
creator: EndangeredBread
